name: Cefazolin
description: I-cephalosporin yesizukulwana sokuqala. I-antibiotic yomgca wokuqala we-parenteral yosulelo oluyingozi lwamanxeba kunye ne-prophylaxis yotyando. Ukhuselo olulungileyo lwegram-positive kuquka ne-MSSA. Nika kwisithuba semizuzu engama-60 yokusikwa kotyando ukwenzela ukuthintela.
dose: 1-2g IV/IM q8h. Iprophylaxis yokuhlinzwa: 2g IV ngaphakathi kwemizuzu engama-60 ngaphambi kokusikwa. Phinda 2g ukuba utyando> 4 iiyure.
window: Ngeprophylaxis yotyando: nika phakathi kwemizuzu engama-60 yokusikwa.
warnings: I-Cross-reactivity kunye ne-penicillin allergy: sebenzisa ngokuqaphela kwizigulane ze-penicillin-alergic.

pediatric.dose: 25-50 mg / kg IV / IM q8h (max 2g / umthamo). I-Prophylaxis: I-30 mg / kg (ubuninzi be-2g) ngaphambi kokusikwa.

obstetric.note: Ikhuselekile ekukhulelweni nasekuncanciseni. I-antibiotic ekhethiweyo ye-parenteral kwiinkqubo zokubeleka.

source: JTS CPG: Wound Care / Surgical Prophylaxis
